creator: discipline@tiscali.it
text:
I'm not sure about all the other ports reported by Piotr(*), but regarding graphics/geeqie I think that this PR could be closed:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/graphics/geeqie/Makefile?id=9ead32c042c617fcd9ecb551f910a13fa297482f

(*) doing a grep for xxd on INDEX it seems that they all are listed
